Chapter 1 Raft Survival: Global Edition The sky above Gwen Swann was a clean, endless blue. No clouds. No contrails. Under her, the ocean went on forever, a dark mouth that did not blink. She sat on a raft barely 43 square feet in area. No land. No boats. No gulls. Just water and the slap of waves. I grew up reading the King James Bible. Never thought to question it. Then I learned 22 books were removed. Not lost. Removed. By 4th-century European councils who decided what we could and couldn't read. The Book of Enoch. Jubilees. The Wisdom of Sirach. All taken out. But Ethiopia never followed those councils. Your GLP-1 f*cked your hair. Not the weight loss. Not the diet. The medication itself. Here's what's actually happening. When you lose fat that fast on Ozempic, Wegovy, or Mounjaro, you lose the estrogen that was stored in that fat. And when estrogen drops, DHT, a hormone that's been in your body your whole life, suddenly has direct access to your hair follicles. It starts shrinking them. Slowly.
